sections.title: During the dwarves' visit in The Fremennik Isles

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. What's happening in town at the moment?

lines.speaker: Vanligga Gastfrihet
lines.text: These dwarves have arrived from Keldagrim - the Chancellor has asked me to look after them, but they are eating all of our food and drinking all of our booze.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are the dwarves doing here?

lines.speaker: Vanligga Gastfrihet
lines.text: They are organising some sort of trade agreement. I don't know what they are trading.

lines.speaker: Vanligga Gastfrihet
lines.text: Oh, hello [Fremennik name]. Always good to see a friend.

lines.speaker: Vanligga Gastfrihet
lines.text: Hmmm, I suppose I can trust you, since you have done me a favour in the past. Can you keep a secret?

lines.speaker: Vanligga Gastfrihet
lines.text: Well as you probably already know, all yak meat and yak products are banned on this island - orders of the King...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That King has some very strange attitudes.

lines.speaker: Vanligga Gastfrihet
lines.text: Well, I have a contact on the other island. Are you interested in obtaining some produce?

lines.speaker: Vanligga Gastfrihet
lines.text: Well, any time you need black market yak produce, you know where to come.

lines.speaker: Vanligga Gastfrihet
lines.text: Well, any time you need black market yak produce, you know where to come.
